name: KrillApp.Trigger.SilentAlarmMs
title: Silent Alarm
description: Monitors for lack of data updates by starting a background delay timer. If no new invocation from its observed sources occurs within the configured delay in milliseconds — stored in this trigger's own meta.snapshot.value as a stringified number (TriggerMetaData has no value field) — the node enters WARN state and fires, invoking every node observing it as a source. Each new invocation resets the timer. Use this to detect disconnected sensors, failed devices, or stale data.
shortDescription: Triggers an alarm when no data updates are received within a configured time period.
llmPurpose: Detects absence of data updates by running a delay timer and firing — invoking its observers — if the timer expires without being reset.
llmBehavior: starts background delay timer when invoked by an observed source
resets timer on each new invocation
sets node state to PAUSED while waiting
sets node state to WARN if timer expires
on expiry, fires; nodes observing this trigger are invoked
llmInputs: delay window in milliseconds stored in this trigger's meta.snapshot.value (stringified number)
invocations from observed sources that reset the timer
llmPromptHints: alert if no data for 5 minutes
llmCreationHints: Create a SilentAlarm when the user wants to detect absence of data or communication failures. Store the delay in milliseconds as a stringified number in the trigger's meta.snapshot.value, and list the watched DataPoint/source in the alarm's sources with SOURCE_INVOKED so each update resets the timer. Alert actions observe this alarm via their own sources.

llmConnectionHints.role: watchdog trigger that fires (invoking its observers) when its observed source stops firing
llmConnectionHints.wiring: Observer-side: list the watched DataPoint/source in sources with SOURCE_INVOKED so each update resets the timer; the delay window lives in meta.snapshot.value; alert actions list this alarm in their own sources.

llmExamples: Alert me if this sensor stops reporting for 5 minutes.
Set up a watchdog that fires if no data arrives in 60 seconds.
Notify me when this device goes offline.
